channel.display-name: Weird or What? With William Shatner
The Yellow Couch with Jeremy Lynch
A New Life in the Sun

programme.title: Queen Of The Desert
programme.desc: A chronicle of Gertrude Bell's life, a traveler, writer, archaeologist, explorer, cartographer, and political attaché for the British Empire at the dawn of the twentieth century.

programme.title: Made In America
programme.desc: When Zora Mathews goes searching for her biological, anonymous sperm donor father, she and her Afro-centric mother Sarah are dumbfounded to discover Hal Jackson, an obnoxious used car salesman on late-night TV; and worse than that, he's white.

programme.title: Horns
programme.desc: A man wakes up after the death of his girlfriend to find he has grown horns.

programme.title: The Negotiator
programme.desc: The tables turn when a seasoned hostage negotiator takes hostages and risks all to prove his own innocence.

programme.title: Noah
programme.desc: Russell Crowe stars as Noah in the timeless story of courage, sacrifice, and hope. This visually stunning, action-adventure is hailed as "one of the most unforgettable Biblical epics ever put on film." *Richard Roeper, Chicago-Sun-Times

programme.title: High Crimes
programme.desc: A woman's life becomes embroiled in a huge military cover-up when it's revealed her husband is not who he says he is.

programme.title: Bedazzled
programme.desc: Elliot Richards is a hapless young man consumed by unrequited love, and desperate to change his life, he makes a deal with the devil who slyly promises to do just that — for a price.

programme.title: Jumper
programme.desc: A man discovers that he possesses the ability to instantly teleport anywhere in the world.

programme.title: Magi-Nation
programme.desc: While traveling To Arderial to persuade the Guardian Hyren to join their quest, the Final Dreamers discover that the cloud-dwelling Arderialites aren't impressed with their past exploits.

programme.title: MetaJets
programme.desc: When billionaire inventor, GRIFFEN HAWKSMORE, is snatched by black cloud during the unveiling of a new weapons defense system, Captain Strong fears that Raven is trying to steal the design for himself.

programme.title: Magi-Nation
programme.desc: The kids take off an incredible journey across the Moonlands, as they team-up with Chur... who was stripped of his Shadow Magi powers by Gorgram. Now, the Final Dreamers must use the ancient magical obelisks in each realm to charge a powerful relic.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Uprising
programme.desc: The 'Bots reach Cybertron to find Megatron (now calling himself Galvatron) already winning the war. The minicons fend off an attack by Unicron, warning of great danger, but Galvatron believes it just an Autobot trick.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Metamorphosis
programme.desc: Escaping from the confrontation between Bots and Cons, Alex, Rad and Carlos find the cargo hold of the Exodus underground and are adopted by three minicons. Retreating to the moon, the 'Cons make the wreck of the Exodus there their base.

programme.title: Magi-Nation
programme.desc: Korg's theft of a scroll from Naroom's library sends our heroes in pursuit of the Shadow Magi to the forbidding desert realm of the Sands of D’Resh. They ride aboard a Quanjuel – a horse-like creature that can travel through magical vortexes.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Threaten
programme.desc: Sabre, Shield and Blaster together create the Hydra Cannon. Installed on their new ship, the Decepticons test it on a comet - then Megatron orders Starscream to use it to destroy the Autobot base. Problem is, that'll also destroy the earth.

programme.title: Magi-Nation
programme.desc: Tony's haunted dreams about his Grandpa lead the final dreamers to Orothe, where they find a surly, mean-tempered Spencer. But the kids are distracted by an unknown Shadow Magi, Mercenair, who is attacking the realm's powerful coral reef.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Vow
programme.desc: Megatron's plan to split up the Autobot team and defeat them individually fails when it's revealed that the minicons have their own, secret agenda.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: A Piece of the Puzzle
programme.desc: Zaizen has the upper hand, but Playmaker’s looking to make one last play to take him down!

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Mc Crossroads / Lucky Duck
programme.desc: McGee signs a contract with Sheba the bandshee.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Truth and Consequences
programme.desc: Playmaker makes a final stand against Varis to save LINK VRAINS!

programme.title: Massive Monster Mayhem
programme.desc: Master Mayhem’s trying to get fit, with the help of his ultimate buff-bot monster, RoBro. But working out is a bit too much work, for this pizza-loving galactic overlord. So he’s sending RoBro to flex his muscles, and whip Planet Earth into shape.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Dash
programme.desc: While the battle continues, Hot Shot goes to Cybertron to try to convince Galvatron of the impending danger. Thrust's true allegiance and agenda is revealed.

programme.title: Magi-Nation
programme.desc: The kids stumble upon an ancient secret when their quest leads them to the Volcanic realm of Cald. Buried beneath rivers of lava, is the relic-forger, a tool used to create any relic…just by thinking of it!

programme.title: Kung Fu Dino Posse
programme.desc: Jet’s skateboard prowess lands him an endorsement deal with a local extreme sports company. The terms of the deal with “Gnarly Sports” requires him to wear the Gnarly Logo on everything, including his Posse gear and weapons.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Kolter’s Khronicles
programme.desc: The Hanoi have expanded their reach beyond the boundaries of LINK VRAINS, and Kolter’s chronicling the chaos!

programme.title: Magi-Nation
programme.desc: The Final Dreamers are flabbergasted when they are approached by Gorgram, who urges them to stop Korg and Zed from taking control of a doomsday weapon called the Gear, which would destroy half the Moonlands.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Link the Circuit
programme.desc: Playmaker’s duel with Varis reveals a link connecting his past to the present!

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Credulous
programme.desc: Grabbing onto Megatron at the end of a battle, Hot Shot and Sideways are transported to the moon. The battle resumes, but Hot Shot is betrayed, and Starscream gains the Star Sabre.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Lakebo-tron / Rise of the Dawn of the Beginning of the Planet of Armand!
programme.desc: McGee and Buttsquat go head-to-head in an 80's style arcade game! But as the points build up, the boys become digitized inside the game. The kids head back through the Lakebottom inter-dimensional portal, hoping to find a Sasquatch version of the camp.
programme.sub-title: Lakebo-tron / Rise of the Dawn of the Beginning of the Planet of Armand!

programme.title: Kung Fu Dino Posse
programme.desc: Jet is suffering from terrible W.O. – Wing Odor – and it’s making all the other Posse members nuts. No matter how much under-wing deodorant he uses, he still stinks.

programme.title: MetaJets
programme.desc: When ‘Cane and Diesel (”Pirates of the Sky”) go looking for scrap metal on a trash barge, they stumble across the wreckage of Boomer’s sentient jet (”Lightning in a Battle”) which soon takes over their floating village.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Are You My Mommy? / Slimey Come Home
programme.desc: The Campers and Buttsquat come across an ancient pyramid inhabited by mummy's.
programme.sub-title: Are You My Mommy? / Slimey Come Home

programme.title: Street Sharks
programme.desc: In PART TWO, Paradigm offers to help the government scientists with the Street Sharks.

programme.title: MetaJets
programme.desc: When a massive meteor enters Earth’s atmosphere, the Metajets are forced to do the unthinkable - team up with Black cloud to save the planet

programme.title: Storm Hawks
programme.desc: Young Sky Knight Aerrow and his squadron, the Storm Hawks, get their first taste of battle when the sinister Master Cyclonis sends the dread Dark Ace to steal the most powerful crystal in the Atmos: the Aurora Stone.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Crack
programme.desc: With the kids befriending and welcoming him, the Autobots deeply suspicious of him, and driven by his need to kill Megatron, the deeply conflicted Starscream trusts Thrust and returns to the moon base with the Star Sabre and Skyboom Shield.

programme.title: Magi-Nation
programme.desc: Tony's vision of Evu being captured by Shadow Magi prompts Edyn and Strag to join him as Evu's bodyguards in her journey across the Sands of D’Resh. Three Shadow Magi manage to track them down nonetheless and a battle ensues to protect Evu.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Link to the Future
programme.desc: Varis is on the verge of victory unless Playmaker can make one last play to stop him!

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Remorse
programme.desc: Hot Shot insists they should take vengeance on the Decepticons: Scavenger, with the support of the minicons, reminds him of their true purpose. With Hot Shot's realisation of the right way forward, Jetfire hands over command to him.

programme.title: Street Sharks
programme.desc: Dr. Piranoid creates a new Seaviate hench-creature - Killamari, a gene-slammed Giant Squid with a venomous sting.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Ice Queen / Live and Let Squatch
programme.desc: When the campers try to reclaim their stolen Lakebottom items.
programme.sub-title: Ice Queen / Live and Let Squatch

programme.title: MetaJets
programme.desc: Johnny and Maggie find themselves trapped in the Andes, by a reclusive tribe who refuse to let them leave for fear that their life of solitude will be disrupted.

programme.title: Magi-Nation
programme.desc: Our trio arrive in the sky realm of Arderial where they meet Shimmer, an old friend of Orwin's who is the Headmistress of the Academy of Wind Magic. They're hoping to get Shimmer's help in finding the Arderial Dreamstone.

programme.title: MetaJets
programme.desc: A race through the old chunnel system that runs under the streets of London becomes deadly when a local anarchist group - led by Zak’s idol, Razor

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: First Encounter
programme.desc: During the war on Cybertron, the Mini-Cons, mini-transformers who can be used as upgrades by their bigger brethren, crash lands on Earth. In present day, a group of children finds their ship by accident which brings the war to Earth.

programme.title: Magi-Nation
programme.desc: A battle with Mercenair accidentally opens the vortex on another portal to Earth…and sucks up the Moonlands Diamond! The Final Dreamers must travel back to Tony's home to find the diamond, and settle the score with one of Tony's so-called best friends.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Marshmallow Madness / 28 Suzi's Later
programme.desc: Armand goes into a feeding frenzy when wild marshmallows give the campers a rash.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: Six and a half million dollars. Even the world's largest casino is barely big enough to contain this final table as the enormous Foxwoods Resort and Casino becomes ground zero for one of the largest poker tournaments in history.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: Sin City rings up a heavenly payout as Bellagio in Las Vegas hosts the final table of the five million dollar Five Diamond World Poker Classic.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: Cinderella gets a tan as the WPT soaks up the fun in the Bahamas with a table full of reckless newcomers and a scorching $3,500,000 prize pool.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: In Mississippi it's an epic David vs. Goliath battle as three young guns go up against three of the biggest names in poker for a river of cash – over $5,000,000.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: Southern California is rockin' and rollin' as the WPT shakes up Los Angeles with the largest prize pool in west coast history.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: The WPT extends an invitation to glory and some of the best in the game RSVP as the World Poker Tour and LA's Commerce Casino play host to the WPT Invitational.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: A $4,000,000 prize pool is in the crosshairs and everybody is gunning for glory at the final table of the WPT Bay 101 Shooting Star.
programme.sub-title: San Jose's Bay 101 Shooting Stars of Poker 2005

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: It's a titanic payout on the Pacific Ocean as the World Poker Tour goes Crusin' Mexico onboard a luxury liner and comes up with a double millionaire night.
programme.sub-title: Cruisin' Mexico with Party Poker Million 2005

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: In Reno it's a race to the finish as an established Poker Pro battles a wave of undiscovered talent for a 1.7 million dollar prize pool and a seat in next week's WPT World Championship.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: Who's the best player in poker? Find out when Bellagio in Las Vegas becomes the battleground for the most prestigious title.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 11
programme.desc: Alice gets her claws into dog-lover William's cover when he betrays his furry friends in ink. Emma disguises her tattooed equations after attempts to impress her maths teacher didn't add up.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 12
programme.desc: Sketch helps Sian cover a clown tattoo that's scaring the life out of anyone who sees it. Jay has to deal with Emma's extremely intimate cat portrait. Daz needs assistance covering a boastful tattoo.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Family Vacation: Rewriting History
programme.desc: With Angelina's wedding right around the corner, the squad comes together to celebrate her with a trip to the Jersey Shore.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Family Vacation: You Had Me At Um, Hello!
programme.desc: The big day is finally here! Jenni is feeling cursed, Angelina is feeling blessed, and Mike is feeling a little orange.
programme.sub-title: You Had Me At Um, Hello!

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Family Vacation: The Speech Pt. 1
programme.desc: Angelina and Chris tie the knot. Vinny objects. And the girls' speech in honor of the bride leads to a roomful of Staten Island boos.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Family Vacation: The Speech Pt. 2
programme.desc: Angelina's wedding reception erupts into chaos after Deena, Jenni and Nicole deliver their speech. The girls are horrified, Angelina snaps, and the guys try to make things right. But the damage done may be well beyond repair.

programme.title: Ex on the Beach: Girl Code
programme.desc: Out of the sea comes a familiar face - Ash from Ex On The Beach series one. The girls fancy him, the boys fear him and when Ash picks Anita for a private party, Gary goes crazy!

programme.title: Ex on the Beach: Anita's Almighty Meltdown
programme.desc: It's almost over and as some exes make peace, others will never see eye to eye. Anita has a meltdown and with one last trip to the beach, who's in for the ultimate shock?

programme.title: Ex on the Beach
programme.desc: Hold onto your bikinis, Ex On The Beach is back, and with more exes than ever! Zahida and Maisie clash over Sean, but when the first Ex blasts onto the beach the fighting really kicks in. (S6, ep1)

programme.title: Ex on the Beach: A Sea Of Tears
programme.desc: The villa reaches breaking point with the arrival of not one but three Exes, causing chaos for lovebirds Ross and Harriette. Meanwhile Zahida's Ex, Joe, spirals out of control.

programme.title: Ex on the Beach: Harriette's Love Triangle
programme.desc: The misery continues for the singles as Sean moves from Zahida to Zaralena, and Harriette's love triangle deepens. Maisie's desperate for action and a Geordie makes a spectacular entrance.

programme.title: Ex on the Beach: Nicole's Nightmare
programme.desc: The tension in the villa reaches boiling point as Zaralena feels the force of Zahida's rage. Josh has his eye on Nicole, but will it be game over when she discovers a devastating secret?

programme.title: Laguna Beach: You Don't Just Get Me Back
programme.desc: With prom just around the corner, Alex decides that he made a huge mistake when he broke up with Rocky.
programme.sub-title: You Don't Just Get Me Back

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 13
programme.desc: Harry wants a memorial tattoo dedicated to a very intimate part of himself after surviving testicular cancer. Matt has doodled on his own legs with a tattoo machine his parents got him for Christmas.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 14
programme.desc: The artists cover Zoe's tattoo dedicated to her favourite food, Sean's lewd and lengthy leprechaun that his wife wants rid of, and Chantal's pitiful pop portrait that looks like a famous footballer.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 15
programme.desc: Hayley's cheeky cartoon tattoo is threatening to derail her wedding plans. Mick wants to cover an X-rated inking that's causing embarrassment to his daughter. Dom's saucy camel is giving him the hump.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 1
programme.desc: Jay saves Luke's bacon with a polished portrait. Sketch beautifies Mark's belly Buddha.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 2
programme.desc: Alice tackles Beverley's backside blunder. Jay wipes Bailey's holiday Poomoji tatt clean.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 4
programme.desc: John's tattoo is on another planet, while Alec has made a big mistake with a tiny inking.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 5
programme.desc: Jay gives Ian a portrait that has to be seen to be believed and Alice covers Linsey's scar.

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 183
programme.desc: Can excavators row a barge, take you wakeboarding or do acrobatics? Can you patch the fuselage of a plane with duct tape?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 47
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can a deadly crossbow be made from materials available to prison inmates? Can vodka remove the smell of cigarettes from clothes or kill bees like an insecticide?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 214
programme.desc: Is a bathroom's hand dryer better than a paper towel? Which public restroom stall is the cleanest? Is it better to stand in the doorway during an earthquake?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 90
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can someone's hat be shot off? Is it possible to break someone out of jail with horses? Can an airbag turn a lock-pick into a lethal spear?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 134
programme.desc: Is it possible to lift a car using nothing but duct tape? Can duct tape plug holes in the bottom of boats? Can you create a working sail-boat out of duct tape?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 220
programme.desc: Can you herd cats? Can you catch a greased pig? Can you stuff 10 pounds of feces into a 5-pound bag?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 58
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can a laser alarm be defeated? Can a metal duct be stealthily climbed using magnets? Can a pressure switch be defeated? How easy is it to crack a safe?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 32
programme.desc: Myths tested: What is the fastest way to cool a case of beer? Was a battery able to be used for certain tasks in ancient times?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 197
programme.desc: Can you jump to safety from a collapsing rope bridge as seen in the film "Cliffhanger"? Can a strong enough hailstorm sink a boat?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 54
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can mind control be achieved? Can a room be painted with dynamite?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 189
programme.desc: Can a vehicle run as well on square wheels as it does on round ones? Can two cars stuck nose to nose really do the maneuvers shown in the film "Date Night?"

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 14
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can a marching battalion take down a bridge? How many bacteria reside on a toothbrush? Is it possible to water ski behind a rowing eight?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 44
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can two semi-trucks collide head-on and completely crush a compact car? Can vodka cure foot odor or bad breath?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 176
programme.desc: What can a driver use to replace a flat tire without a spare? Can a fishing reel catch fire with a fast enough fish on the line?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 28
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can a person be blown away by a bullet? Can a certain note make a person have fecal incontinence? Does Chinese water torture work?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 115
programme.desc: Is it possible to lift a car using fire hoses? Do goats faint when scared? Can a person create a huge fireball with sawdust and a flare?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 106
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can a lead balloon fly? Is it possible to surf a wave caused by an explosion?

programme.title: Dirty Rotten Scoundrels
programme.desc: The south of France. Two rival con men -- one is suave and sophisticated, the other is a third-rate American hustler -- make a wager.

programme.title: A Haunted House
programme.desc: When Malcolm’s (Marlon Wayans) girlfriend moves into his house, he soon discovers the love of his life is possessed by an evil spirit. Malcolm enlists the help of Father Williams (Cedric the Entertainer) to exorcise the demon from his girlfriend.

programme.title: Unfinished Business
programme.desc: A hard-working small business owner and his two associates travel to Europe to close the most important deal of their lives. But what began as a routine business trip goes off the rails in every way imaginable, and unimaginable.

programme.title: Airplane Mode
programme.desc: Horny American teenagers fly to Australia for sex at the social media convention in Sydney. Will Logan survive his fear of flying? Will the pilots survive passengers not using airplane mode? Will anyone survive?

programme.title: Romance and Cigarettes
programme.desc: Musical set in Bensonhurst, N.Y. In it a two-timing husband must choose between his mistress and his beleaguered wife.

programme.title: Just My Luck
programme.desc: Sexy Manhattanite Ashley is known as the luckiest woman around, but after a chance romantic encounter with down-and-out Jake, she realizes that she's swapped her fortune for his.

programme.title: Barbershop
programme.desc: Calvin, who inherited a struggling barbershop, views the shop as nothing but a burden and waste of his time. After selling the shop to a local loan shark, Calvin slowly begins to see his father's vision and legacy .

programme.title: Monte Carlo
programme.desc: Grace becomes a princess when a summer trip to Paris turns into the fantasy of a lifetime.

programme.title: School for Scoundrels
programme.desc: A young guy short on luck enrolls in a class to build confidence to help win over the girl of his dreams, which becomes complicated when his teacher has the same agenda.

programme.title: Dirty Work
programme.desc: A spiteful loser finds his true calling when he opens a highly successful business specializing in revenge.

programme.title: M.A.S.K.
programme.desc: Masquerading as an evil giant, VENOM sets up a giant magnetic force on a tropical island which pulls a freighter loaded with platinum right onto shore.

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: Colonel K teams Danger Mouse up with a robot Penfold, and Penfold with a robot Danger Mouse. The robots prove to be a lot of trouble for the real ones, taking instructions too literally or getting stuck running in circles.
programme.sub-title: Four Heads Are Better Than Two

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: Greenback kidnaps Penfold to get Danger Mouse to bring him four ingredients needed for an evil spell to take over the world: The hair of a yeti, straw from a witch's broom, a piece of the London fog monster, and the tail feathers of Count Duckula.
programme.sub-title: The Four Tasks of Danger Mouse

programme.title: M.A.S.K.
programme.desc: VENOM has a gravity force that smashes things flat.

programme.title: Pink Panther & Pals: Pink Trek
programme.desc: Pink Panther and Hoarse race Big Nose and Dog in a competition to see who will be promoted from janitor to postman.

programme.title: THE NEW PINK PANTHER SHOW
programme.desc: 'Dino Sour Head': An inventive prehistoric Pink Panther must help rid his village of a pesky Tyrannosaur who is causing trouble. 'The Luck o' The Pinkish': While hunting for a four-leaf clover, Pink runs afoul of a mischievous Leprechaun.
programme.sub-title: Dino Sour Head/The Luck O' The Pinkish

programme.title: Count Duckula: The Show Must Go On
programme.desc: Duckula decides to become an actor and stages the story of Jack and the Magic Walnut at the castle.

programme.title: M.A.S.K.
programme.desc: Sometimes even Mask just wants to have fun. That's why Matt Tracker'and Boris Bushkin in Bulldog have joined Brad Turner in Cheetah and Calhoun Burns in Raven at the Round Up Races.

programme.title: Count Duckula: There are Werewolves at the Bottom of Our Garden
programme.desc: The castle's werewolf has escaped and it's up to Igor and Nanny to get it back before Duckula finds out.
programme.sub-title: There are Werewolves at the Bottom of Our Garden

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: Greenback develops age-altering bombs which turn Danger Mouse into an over eager youth and puts Penfold on the verge of senility.

programme.title: THE NEW PINK PANTHER SHOW
programme.desc: 'Rock Me Pink': While trying to get a heavy metal rock star to play his song, Pinky becomes the concert's main attraction. 'Pinkus Pantherus': Pink joins the Roman Legion Army and ends up with the vindictive Manly Man as his commanding officer.

programme.title: THE NEW PINK PANTHER SHOW
programme.desc: 'Trains, Pains and Panthers': Rushing to a job interview, The Panther takes the Hover Train, but runs into the Dogfather and his gang. 'Wet and Wild Pinky': To be promoted to Lifeguard, Pink must baby-sit the boss' precocious niece.
programme.sub-title: Trains, Pains, And Panthers/Wet And Wild

programme.title: Count Duckula: The Lost City of Atlantis
programme.desc: Count Duckula and co. are stuck on a tiny island.

programme.title: Count Duckula: The Count and the Pauper
programme.desc: Duckula is sick of life at the castle and plans to leave Beckindale.

programme.title: M.A.S.K.
programme.desc: Matt's friend, the Duke, needs three rings to unlock a treasure for his country, but he only has two.

programme.title: THE NEW PINK PANTHER SHOW
programme.desc: Pink and Quiet': Pinky can't sleep so he moves to the country where he meets a little girl who makes his life miserable. 'The Pinky 500': Pinky, while trying to win an auto race, must first deal with driving a car that has a mind of its own.

programme.title: M.A.S.K.
programme.desc: VENOM steals all the sails and kidnaps the sailmakers from an Icelandic town and then builds an enormous balloon which they fill with geothermal energy stolen from the town's heating plant.

programme.title: M.A.S.K.
programme.desc: A valuable life-giving meteor is stolen from Professor Stevens by VENOM.

programme.title: M.A.S.K.
programme.desc: Mayhem steals the Book of Power from some monks hoping it will lead him to an ancient city full of riches.

programme.title: Count Duckula: The Lost Valley
programme.desc: Duckula, Igor and Nanny go to watch a film called 'The Lost Valley'.

programme.title: Pink Panther & Pals: Pink on the Pitch
programme.desc: Pink Panther and his team of kids go up against Big Nose and his team of robots in a soccer game.

programme.title: Bill & Ted's Excellent Adventures
programme.desc: Bill and Ted accidentally damage the Mona Lisa and go back in time to have it replaced.

programme.title: THE NEW PINK PANTHER SHOW
programme.desc: Pinky in Paradise': Aided by a Parrot, Pinky searches for buried treasure only to come up against a Voodoo Man. 'Department Story Pink-erton': Pinky gets a security job at a department store and must contend with the notorious 'Whistler.'

programme.title: M.A.S.K.
programme.desc: While Matt is making arrangements for an art exhibit in Rio de Janeiro, VENOM crosses his path by stealing a worthless picture from a child.

programme.title: Bill & Ted's Excellent Adventures
programme.desc: Bill and Ted return to Medieval times in England so they can bring the Princess babes back to sing with the Wyld Stallions at the school dance.
programme.sub-title: A Black Knight In San Dimas

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: Danger Mouse and Penfold are on holiday in the Bernese Alps when they get a call to deal with Count Duckula, who has teamed up with Dr. Frankenstoat to take over the world with a vampire-making machine.

programme.title: Count Duckula: Vampire Vacation
programme.desc: Duckula travels to Spain to meet his arsonist cousin and fights the deadliest bull in Spain.

programme.title: Bill & Ted's Excellent Adventures
programme.desc: Bill and Ted are discouraged when their fourth concert bombs and decide to give up music and the Wyld Stallions. Without telling the boys that their decision will jeopardize the future,
programme.sub-title: When The Going Gets Tough...Bill And Ted Are History

programme.title: Count Duckula: Return of the Curse of the Secret of the Mummy's Tomb Meets Franken Duckula's Monster.
programme.desc: Duckula is chased by an alien cabbage, a werewolf, a mummy, Frankenstein's monster, Von Goosewing, and some angry villagers.
programme.sub-title: Return of the Curse of the Secret of the Mummy's Tomb Meets Franken Duckula's Monster.

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: Danger Mouse and Penfold travel to Wales where they must deal with a fire-breathing dragon. It turns out to be a dragon named Jones who is about the same size as them.

programme.title: THE NEW PINK PANTHER SHOW
programme.desc: 'Pink-Anderthal Man': Manly Man pursues the Panther through the ages. 'Pink Kong': Despite strong opposition from Voodoo Man, the Panther helps Queen Kong realize her dream of becoming a famous torch singer in New York City.

programme.title: Count Duckula: Venice a Duck Not a Duck
programme.desc: In Venice, the Egg plans to get his revenge on Duckula.
programme.sub-title: Venice a Duck Not a Duck

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: Count Duckula and Greenback team to find the bone idol, an artifact that supposedly has the spirit of Cerberus and that can control all the dogs in the world.

programme.title: THE NEW PINK PANTHER SHOW
programme.desc: 'The Inspector's Most Wanted': A criminal from The Inspector's past seeks revenge by having him perform on the all-too-realistic Cop Patrol television show. 'Pinky Appleseed,' Pinky's efforts to re-plant a forest are obstructed by Paul Bunyan.

programme.title: M.A.S.K.
programme.desc: VENOM steals the second half of the Emerald Arrowhead from Scott and an Indian boy which leads them to the mysteriously powerful Star Chariot – an ancient alien spacecraft.

programme.title: M.A.S.K.
programme.desc: Mayhem kidnaps a baby lizard Dinosaur from the jungle.

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: Inside the Royal Albert Hall, Greenback reveals his new invention: a duplication machine he plans to use to make hundreds of Greenbacks so that no-one would find the real one.

programme.title: Count Duckula: Unreal Estate
programme.desc: Duckula is fed up with the Castle crumbling around him so he decides to sell it much to Igor's horror in Hollywood.

programme.title: M.A.S.K.
programme.desc: By using an electromagnetic pulse, VENOM melts everything electrical, which stops the Indy 500 and they get away with the ticket money.

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: Danger Mouse and Penfold must stop Baron Greenback from using a heat ray to melt the polar ice caps to cause a flood so he can make a fortune selling inflatable boats and rubber ducks.

programme.title: Count Duckula: Hi-Duck
programme.desc: Duckula, Igor and Nanny take an airplane to Nice.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 11
programme.desc: Martin & Lucy visit a house in Salford, a plot in Chatham and a large property in Brampton that could be split into two.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 5
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a three-bedroom Devon property requiring a simple re-paint job, a Kent semi with great proportions & Martin enters a time warp in Telford.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 11
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a three bedroom Victorian mid-terrace house in Cheshire, a Wiltshire village-based plot offering planning permission and finally a Victorian two-up, two-down in Leeds.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin Roberts and Lucy Alexander visit homes in Yorkshire, Essex and Norwich.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy view a two-bedroom in Lancashire, a shop in Middlesex and a little flat in Newcastle.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 2
programme.desc: Martin & Lucy visit a hidden gem in Derby, a property in West London and a house in Hastings.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 25
programme.desc: Lucy and Martin visit a house in Plymouth, a 400 year old cottage in Dorset and finally a wacky but wonky two bedroomed flat in Liverpool.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 9
programme.desc: Martin & Lucy visit an end of terrace in Manchester, a three bed house in Kent and a two bed semi in Derby.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit properties in North London and Durham.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 19
programme.desc: Martin & Lucy visit a terraced house in Chatham, Kent, a house in Derby and a flat in a historic building in Oxfordshire.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 15
programme.desc: Lucy Alexander and Martin Roberts travel to Dorset to a bungalow surrounded by the beautiful countryside. Then on to Tooting to see a 1st floor flat in urgent need of a face lift. Stoke-on-Trent offers a garage soon to be luxury studio flats.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 14
programme.desc: Lucy and Martin visit a three bedroom property which requires a lot of work but has a number of original features, a boarded up property in Manchester and a four bedroom end of terrace property in Southampton which is crying out for renovation.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 15
programme.desc: Martin Roberts and Lucy Alexander visit houses in Derby, Kent and Trent.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy view a barn in Kent, a Victorian mansion Lancashire and an old chapel in Wales.
In a totalitarian future society, Winston Smith, whose daily work is re-writing history, tries to rebel by falling in love.

programme.title: Poltergeist II: The Other Side
programme.desc: Those ghastly ghosts return to battle once more with JoBeth Williams and Craig T. Nelson for the soul of a young clairvoyant.

programme.title: Poltergeist III
programme.desc: In the climactic finale to the Poltergeist trilogy, those elusive demons are more frightening than ever as they follow Carol Anne to Chicago and inhabit an entire skyscraper.

programme.title: Hot Tub Time Machine
programme.desc: Four buddies share a wild night of drinking in a ski resort hot tub and wake up with hangovers in 1986! Now, they’ll need the help of a one-armed bellhop and a hot tub repairman to survive the crazy 80’s, but it may change their future forever!

programme.title: Species: Species
programme.desc: She's beautiful, seductive, intelligent, and her charms could spell doom for the entire human race! Ben Kingsley, Forrest Whitaker and Natasha Henstridge star in this adrenaline-charged sci-fi hit.

programme.title: Futtock's End
programme.desc: In this silent-style comedy, General Futtock hosts a weekend at his country estate. Chaos erupts as the butler (Sir Michael Hordern) spies on guests, rum spills into the punch, and a lost Japanese tourist adds to the mayhem. Hilarity ensues.

programme.title: The Ape Man
programme.desc: A crazed scientist accidentally turns himself into a half ape, half human creature, and scrambles to find a cure.

programme.title: Ben-Hur
programme.desc: A Jewish prince seeks his family and revenge against his childhood friend who wrongfully imprisoned him.

programme.title: The Astral Factor
programme.desc: A police detective (Robert Foxworth) with a joking wife (Stefanie Powers) tries to catch a strangler who can make himself invisible.

programme.title: Gold
programme.desc: A ruthless global cabal of financial investors plan to manipulate the price of gold by flooding one of South Africa’s top gold mines. Starring: Roger Moore, Susannah York, Ray Milland, Bradford Dillman, Bernard Horsfall, John Hussey

programme.title: Euronews
programme.desc: Euronews offers a unique perspective on world events. It empowers people to make up their own mind by delivering factual analysis and a diversity of viewpoints. Because all views matter, Euronews is "All Views".

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Behind lace-curtained windows and beneath sensible haircuts lurked evil. Appearances were deceptive. We did not notice these female killers walking by. These women wore a mask of sanity.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: A rifle in a shopping mall, a syringe of potassium chloride and a syringe of insulin, each in the hands of a mentally disturbed woman, lead to the tragic end of many lives.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Hearts of Stone
programme.desc: Deadly Women are not always the ones you expect. They are not the strangers lurking in the dark, they are a young mother, a supportive wife and a grandmother - all killers. Behind their loving masquerade lies a wake of family horror and pain.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Judi Buenoano secretly murdered lovers to claim on insurance policies whilst nurse Genene Jones secretly killed at least 46 infants left in her care between 1980 and 1982.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Women who kill husbands, lovers, rivals and parents will shock society. But a very special horror is reserved for women who will kill their own.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: These women never get their hands dirty: no blood touched them because they manipulate others to kill for them...but they didn't get away.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: In some cases, the transformation from everyday woman to brutal killer is activated by a man. A boyfriend or husband can become the focus of a deadly obsession.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: These women burn madly with jealousy, an anger so deep they’ll kill to satisfy it. What makes them turn from “green with envy” to “lethal with jealousy?" Find out as we explore their hearts of darkness.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: A lovely lady with an innocent smile, kind eyes, a charming personality? No one would suspect a woman like that would murder. These women don’t look or behave like killers.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Under His Control
programme.desc: These are love stories with bleak, bloody endings. Blinded by desire, obsessed and malleable, some women fall into lethal relationships with dangerous, controlling men.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: No one doubts a woman’s capacity to love, but sometimes lust can turn lethal. In the ultimate fatal attraction, "Deadly Women" looks at cases of murder driven by obsessive love.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Women are more often prey than predators, but the exceptions are deadly women indeed. In this episode, we’ll discover what drove these deadly women to prey on the unsuspecting.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Greed is one of the oldest motives for murder, and these deadly women are no exception: they’ll do anything to satisfy their need for cash. This is the dangerous world of the fortune hunters.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Greed
programme.desc: Known as “black widows,” these women kill their spouses, lovers and children for profit. Murder for them becomes a business. Their trade is murder. Their profit? Blood money.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Crimes of revenge are usually single acts of passion. A brew of hatred and restitution boils over in a manic moment of fury. Once caught, revenge killers usually display remorse and atonement.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: The path towards revenge can sometimes lead to murder. It can be quick, fiery and violent. It can also be a dish served cold, the product of a calm, calculated plot.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Sometimes, when a man and a woman unite, a terrible urge for destruction can awaken in them both. Happy couples become deadly teams, intent on one goal: murder.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: While marriage is meant to be for life, it often ends in divorce. These wives took their marriages vow seriously: "till death do us part."

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Blood ties are strong ties, sometimes strong enough to pull a person into a murderous conspiracy. When a family member wields his or her power, the result can be death.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Hired Gun
programme.desc: When three people were found murdered in their home, it appeared like a burglary gone awry. But a crime this horrific deserved a closer look.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Takeover
programme.desc: Two armed bank robbers hit a Seattle bank taking over 150,000 dollars. Before they can escape police confront them and the pair splits up. As authorities search block by block they learn one was a career criminal with a long history of violence.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Melissa Brannen: Missing
programme.desc: In 1989, residents of a close-knit apartment community in Virginia gathered for a holiday celebration. For Tammy Brannen and five-year-old daughter Melissa, Christmas was always a special time. Then, without warning, the little girl was gone.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Brutal Abduction
programme.desc: A Chicago street gang thought they had figured out how to kidnap people for ransom again and again, and never get caught. But their one mistake was they underestimated the Federal Bureau of Investigation.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Global Pursuit
programme.desc: In Langley, Virginia, a terrorist fired into rush hour traffic. The victims seemed randomly selected, but the motive appeared to be political, targeting employees of the Central Intelligence Agency.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Hunter's Game
programme.desc: In the 1970's and 80s, people went to Alaska looking for a fresh start, to reinvent themselves, or to disappear for a while. Some of those disappearances weren't by choice.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Coffee Shop Murders
programme.desc: At a coffee shop in Washington, DC, three employees were shot to death. Evidence at the crime scene pointed in many different directions. Was this a hate crime, a robbery gone wrong or an act of cold-blooded vengeance?

programme.title: The FBI Files: Shattered Shield
programme.desc: In a city awash in narcotics the drug lords have all the power even over the police. Corruption in New Orleans grew like cancer, eating away at public safety and threatening to destroy the city. Crooked cops break the laws they were sworn to uphold.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Master Plan
programme.desc: Willow Springs, Illinois, seemed like any other quiet Midwestern community. But it was really one of the most corrupt places in the nation. This tiny village, nestled just outside of Chicago, was in the hip pocket of organized crime.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Obsession
programme.desc: Power is a responsibility as well as a privilege. But in the wrong hands, power can corrupt. For former Deputy Attorney General for the State of Delaware, losing sight of his sworn oath to uphold justice could prove lethal.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Backstage Murder
programme.desc: In the 1980's, two partners created a nightclub that would bring them wealth and international fame. The male strip club phenomenon promised female patrons fun and excitement. But the bright lights hid a dark side.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Lost Boys
programme.desc: In June of 1997, a crime wave swept Iowa like a tornado. It left a trail of robbery, kidnapping, and murder in its wake, and then it moved on. No one knew where.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Millionaire Murder
programme.desc: A businessman went to Florida to make one last deal before he retired-he never returned home to his millions. Authorities examined who was closest to him and who stood to gain from his disappearance. But this time conventional rules didn't apply.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Cat and Mouse
programme.desc: He was a predator, abducting girls and young women from their own front yards in broad daylight. He was a sadist: phoning one victim's family, taunting them, boosting then dashing their hope, and he wouldn't stop until we stopped him.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Evil Intent
programme.desc: Drops of blood and a torn screen were all that's left to tell authorities what happened to a woman in Indiana. The 21 yr. old victim was taken from her home on a spring morning. She appeared to have no real enemies, there was no clear motive.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Trail
programme.desc: The disappearance of young women triggered a search that spanned the Pacific Northwest. A massive media campaign failed to locate the drifter, who first charmed then killed them. As investigators followed his trail, he always stayed one step ahead.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan convinces Klink and the Gestapo that the war is over so that they will release some prisoners.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan helps Klink prepare for a hasty trip to Argentina when he finds himself in a duel.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Using the German propaganda radio network,Hogan gets information to the underground.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan helps an escapee go out of camp in a balloon.
programme.sub-title: What Time Does the Balloon Go Up?

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: LeBeau says that he keeps rendezvousing with a little old lady who is actually young and beautiful.
programme.sub-title: LeBeau and the Little Old Lady

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan has trouble trying to get thirty prisoners out of camp.
programme.sub-title: How to Escape from Prison Camp Without Really Trying

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: A collection of stolen art comes to Stalag 13 and Hogan decides to steal it back for the Allies.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan makes the Germans think that Schultz has ESP to get them to move their anti-aircraft defenses.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan's latest escapee is a chimp from the local zoo who helps them deliver a radio part to the underground.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: A German truck carrying an experimental jet fuel is the latest target for Hogan and his men. But when all efforts to sabotage the shipment fail, Carter gets down to business with the remaining weaponry at hand - a bow and arrow.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: How can Hogan and his crew keep Sgt. Schultz from being transferred to the Russian Front?
programme.sub-title: Clearance Sale at the Black Market

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Coming up with a fake secret device, the gonculator, Klink brings to Stalag 13 the electronics expert who wants to defect.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: The Gestapo sets a trap for the elusive underground agent known as 'Papa Bear' (Hogan) and Newkirk gets caught.
programme.sub-title: How to Catch a Papa Bear

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan's Trucking Service... We Deliver the Factory to You
programme.sub-title: Hogan's Trucking Service... We Deliver the Factory to You

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: The Gestapo brings three lovely ladies into the camp to interrogate the prisoners.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan's crew is chasing a dog around after it buries a bone that contains negatives of a new German tank.
programme.sub-title: Man's Best Friend Is Not His Dog

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Plans to destroy a nearby rocket-fuel plant don't go as Hogan would like.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan and his crew volunteer to paint Luftwaffe headquarters to get a secret map of fighter deployment locations.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan makes arrangements for a contact to get to London and then suspects that she is a traitor.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: An American journalist is rescued by Hogan; he is sworn to secrecy and sent back to the States.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: An American agent enters Germany and then works with Hogan's people to get a German officer out of Berlin.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan tricks Klink into throwing a party for a German World War I ace so that Hogan can find the location of his headquarters.
programme.sub-title: Will the Blue Baron Strike Again?

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: When Carter, in the disguise of the camp kommandant, is seen leaving Stalag 13, Klink could end up being tried for treason.
programme.sub-title: Will the Real Colonel Klink Please Stand Up Against the Wall?

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan is hot on the trail of capturing LeBeau, but not too quickly since he has a mission to complete.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes

programme.desc: Since October 10th 2008, no-one has seen friendly 38 year-old bachelor John Altinger. All that his friends know is that he was going to a garage in a residential area of Edmonton, to meet a woman he’d met on an online dating site.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Devil in the Woods
programme.desc: On June 24th 1990, the day after a rock festival near Roseisle in Manitoba, 16 year-old Brigitte Grenier is found lying dead in a stream in the middle of the woods. The teenager’s body shows signs of violence and sexual mutilations.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: In Cold Blood
programme.desc: On August 4th, 2008, kayakers found a 40-year-old homeless man, Mark Hanley, floating near the marina in Nanaimo, British Columbia. He had been severely beaten and stabbed.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Til Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: In the small town of Carleton Place, Ontario, on the morning of November 10th, 1994, Garry Samuels drove himself and his wife, Barbara Lanthier, into the Mississippi River. He escaped but claimed he was unable to save his wife.

programme.title: Naked Science: Death Of The Earth
programme.desc: The earth is 4.5 billion years old and it is slowly dying. Tectonic activity is slowly cooling the planet – the continents will eventually move together to form a new supercontinent called Pangea Ultima.

programme.title: Naked Science: Inside The Mind Of Stephen Hawking
programme.desc: Stephen Hawking, though suffering from amyotrophic lateral sclerosis has developed a unique understanding of the universe.
programme.sub-title: Inside The Mind Of Stephen Hawking

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Terry Down Under
programme.desc: Terry and Larry start off the new season testing one of the most requested films, Quigley Down Under.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Larry's Shadow
programme.desc: Larry gets sucked into Terry’s dark and mysterious world because Terry wants to test 2 scenes from the 1994 film with Alec Baldwin, The Shadow.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: RED-ish
programme.desc: Terry takes himself out of “retirement” to test some scenes from RED that will be extremely dangerous.

programme.sub-title: Across the Great Divided Lonesome Mighty River

programme.sub-title: The Last Crusade of Indiana Terry

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Saving Private Terry
programme.desc: Terry gets to relive part of his military carrier by attempting the famous sniper shot from Saving Private Ryan.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Scoreless
programme.desc: Using a unique method to crack a safe, Nick Wells (Robert De Niro) uses a blowtorch to cut through a safe, fill it with water.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Terry and The Minigun
programme.desc: Can you really fire a GE Minigun handheld with ammunition held in a backpack (also seen on Captain America: Winter Soldier).

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: A Pirate’s Life for Terry
programme.desc: Terry and Larry go on a swashbuckling adventure when they test two scenes from the 1920’s film, The Black Pirate starring Douglas Fairbanks, Senior.

programme.title: Bang Goes The Theory
programme.desc: The science of genetic modification in Hawaii; shattering a glass; curing a dust allergy through eating worms.

programme.title: Bang Goes The Theory
programme.desc: The science of 'dad dancing'; Liz tracks her family tree through the use of DNA; Jem builds a singing road.

programme.title: Bang Goes The Theory
programme.desc: A demo of calorific value by taking part in the Oxbridge Boat Race; testing MP's abilities to calculate risk.

programme.title: Bang Goes The Theory
programme.desc: Liz investigates sunburns; making museum visitors act younger and smarter.

programme.title: Bang Goes The Theory
programme.desc: Liz visits the volcano that stopped air travel in 2010; predicting probabilities in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Bang Goes The Theory
programme.desc: The science of IVF; following couples who undertake IVF treatment; going 360 degrees on a swing.

programme.title: Bang Goes The Theory
programme.desc: Boat made out of ice; comets; science behind hypothermia.

programme.title: Bang Goes The Theory
programme.desc: Avoiding jetlag; a demonstration of the size of the solar system; square-wheeled motorbike.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: MANMADE
programme.desc: When it comes to disasters, mother nature has mankind beat. However, as mankind expands, evolves and technology advances, it comes with dangerous challenges. When errors are made or unforeseen circumstances occur, the results can be devastating.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: EARTHQUAKES
programme.desc: Earthquakes happen when tectonic plates suddenly slip causing shock waves to shake the surface of the Earth. They occur on fault lines - the most active are the Ring of Fire in the Pacific Ocean and the San Andreas fault on America’s west coast.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: MEGAFLOODS
programme.desc: Water covers two thirds of the earth’s surface, and we are utterly dependent on it, but when this vital ingredient of life unleashes its fury on the planet it becomes the ultimate bringer of death.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: CONSTRUCTION
programme.desc: Bridges and tunnels have transformed the way we live, making the inaccessible easy to reach, and turning time consuming journeys into convenient commutes, but when things go wrong they can go very wrong indeed.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: AIR, LAND AND SEA
programme.desc: Planes, trains and ships, our mass transit systems, have had a profound effect on mankind, making the world smaller and more connected.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: HURRICANES
programme.desc: Hurricanes, Typhoons and Cyclones all the same thing with different names – what they also have in common is their destructive power! Hurricanes are large, swirling storms and winds from a hurricane can damage buildings or trees.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: TORNADO
programme.desc: A tornado is a violently rotating column of air extending from the base of a thunderstorm down to the ground. Tornadoes are capable of completely destroying well-made structures, uprooting trees, and hurling objects through the air like deadly missiles.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Cosmic Rays
programme.desc: Cosmic rays can tell us much about the universe. They are not simply another form of light, but carriers of information about powerful and unseen processes at work thousands or even millions of light years away.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Fermi Paradox
programme.desc: The Fermi Paradox asks the ultimate question: Given a few reasonable assumptions about the chance of life arising elsewhere in the universe and the distance between the stars, why has an alien civilization not presented itself?

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Landsat
programme.desc: Take a look at Landsat 8, the advanced planetary explorer with a 900 million dollar price tag! It is designed to peer across multiple wavelengths to reveal complex and ever-changing details that are undetectable by the human eye.

programme.title: Earthrise: The First Lunar Voyage
programme.desc: Interviews with Apollo 8 astronauts, their wives, mission control staff, and journalists give true insider's perspective to the space race of the late 1960's.

programme.title: How to Colonize the Stars
programme.desc: Leading physicists and engineers in the field of interstellar travel discuss some of the deep issues we face when considering the problem of sending spacecraft to other stars. Will mankind ever truly become a space fairing civilization?

programme.title: Hunting the Edge of Space: The Mystery of the Milky Way
programme.desc: The Mystery of the Milky Way chronicles the history of telescopes, from Galileo's refractor to Newton's reflector and beyond. This episode also looks at recent missions, including the Herschel Space Observatory's examination of the Milky Wa
programme.sub-title: The Mystery of the Milky Way

programme.title: Hunting the Edge of Space: The Ever Expanding Universe
programme.desc: The Ever-Expanding Universe investigates a battery of high-tech telescopes that are joining the Hubble Space Telescope on its quest to unlock the secrets of our universe, a cosmos almost incomprehensible in its size, age and violence.

programme.title: In the Shadow of the Moon
programme.desc: Between 1968 and 1972, the world watched in awe each time an American spacecraft voyaged to the Moon. Only 12 men walked upon its surface and they remain the only human beings to have stood on another world.

programme.title: Inside Outer Space: Episode 1: The Solar System
programme.desc: This is a series packed with space stories and information about our universe covering what we can see, how we can live in space and what science tells us about the past and the future as we journey inside out of space.

programme.title: Inside Outer Space: Episode 2: Moons
programme.desc: Come with us as we explore and unravel the mysteries of what lies beyond our planet Earth. This is a series packed with space stories and information about our universe covering what we can see.

programme.desc: Come with us as we explore and unravel the mysteries of what lies beyond our planet Earth. This is a series packed with space stories and information about our universe covering what we can see.

programme.desc: Come with us as we explore and unravel the mysteries of what lies beyond our planet Earth. This is a series packed with space stories and information about our universe covering what we can see.

programme.desc: Come with us as we explore and unravel the mysteries of what lies beyond our planet Earth. This is a series packed with space stories and information about our universe covering what we can see.

programme.title: Inside Outer Space: Episode 8: Extravehicular Activity
programme.desc: Come with us as we explore and unravel the mysteries of what lies beyond our planet Earth. This is a series packed with space stories and information about our universe covering what we can see.

programme.title: Moon Shots: Inside the Lost Apollo Archive
programme.desc: The world famous Apollo missions are some of the greatest feats ever accomplished by man. With rare archive footage and unprecedented access to life on board the Apollo spacecrafts, this stunning one-hour special brings scientific history to life.

programme.title: Neil Armstrong: One Small Step
programme.desc: Neil Armstrong has stamped his place in history by becoming the first person to walk on the moon.

programme.title: The Apollo Experience: Apollo 17: Part 1
programme.desc: Between 1960 and 1972, mankind boldly went where no human had been before. Across 11 manned missions, 24 men flew to the moon and 12 walked upon its surface. This film documents Apollo 17 through the eyes of the astronauts who flew.

programme.title: The Apollo Experience: Apollo 17: Part 2
programme.desc: In this episode, hear first hand testimonials and dialogue from the incredible men who walked on the moon. Incredible footage and photos give a unique and beautiful experience of their data collection process and journey home.

programme.title: The Fabric of the Cosmos: What Is Space?
programme.desc: Brian Greene reveals space as a dynamic fabric that can stretch, twist, warp, and ripple under the influence of gravity, and explores dark energy, which makes up 70% of the universe.

programme.title: The Fabric of the Cosmos: The Illusion of Time
programme.desc: Brian Greene takes us on the ultimate time traveling adventure, hurtling 50 years into the future before stepping into a wormhole to travel back to Big Bang.

programme.title: The Iron Mask
programme.desc: Action legends Jackie Chan and Arnold Schwarzenegger team up in this high concept fantasy historical epic. Set in the 18th century, English traveller Jonathan Green travels from Russia to China encountering dragons, black magic wizardry and a dragon king!

programme.title: Season of the Witch
programme.desc: His faith broken by years of battle as a crusader, Behmam, a medieval knight, returns to central Europe to find his homeland decimated by the Black Plague.

programme.title: Drive
programme.desc: A Hollywood stunt performer (Ryan Gosling) who moonlights as a wheelman discovers that a contract has been put on him after a heist gone wrong.

programme.desc: Jason Statham stars as a Las Vegas bodyguard with lethal skills and a gambling problem. When he gets in trouble with the mob, he has one last play and it's all or nothing.

programme.desc: When unemployed Scottish miner Danny Scoular (Liam Neeson) agrees to fight a one-off bare-knuckle bout, he not only risks losing his wife and kids, but enters a hellish domain lorded over by a ruthless Glasgow gang boss.

programme.title: Odds and Evens
programme.desc: The navy's detective gets his brother, an ex gambler, to help him liquidate an illegal gaming house on a yacht near Miami.

programme.desc: In this tense action-thriller starring Ray Winstone and Temuera Morrison, Arjan, an ex-soldier, is hired to hunt down a fugitive. But what starts out as easy bounty soon turns into a dangerous game of cat and mouse.

programme.title: The Sentinel

programme.desc: A weekend getaway takes a dangerous turn when a mysterious nightclub owner introduces a group of friends to a new designer drug. Stripped of their inhibitions, they start living out their wildest fantasies.

programme.desc: As Jack leaves town for business, he seizes the opportunity to take Lori along so that they rekindle their relationship. But when he disappears, Lori discovers that Jack was about to reveal the corruption that exists within the company…

programme.title: Space Truckers

programme.desc: After undergoing an experimental time travel "process" that sends a man into his future, he investigates the man he has become, by engaging in a romance with his future self's girlfriend in a mind-bending reality.

programme.desc: An idealistic, attractive young couple acquires a stunning, life-like robot for guilt-free help; but, as the three grow closer, their perception of humanity will be altered forever.

programme.desc: A young farmer sets out to recruit mercenaries to defend his peaceful planet, which is under threat of invasion by the evil tyrant Sador and his armada of aggressors. Starring: George Peppard, Robert Vaughn, Richard Thomas

programme.title: The New Detectives: Murderous Attraction
programme.desc: In Columbus, Ohio, a woman is found shot in the head. The death is ruled a suicide, but something is not right and detectives refuse to let the matter rest.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Absent Witness
programme.desc: When killers hide or destroy the remains of their victims, it becomes the mission of forensic scientists to reconstruct the scenes and prove murder for an absent witness.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Trails of Evidence
programme.desc: In criminal investigations, a simple clue can provide the missing link by placing a suspect at a crime scene. Dirt left on shoes, tires or clothes, or even a tiny piece of plastic can pinpoint a crime scene.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Betrayed
programme.desc: Sometimes when a death seems to be accidental or the result of a tragic accident, it is up to forensic scientists to reveal the deception lying just below the surface.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Silent Killers
programme.desc: Weeks pass as forensic investigators search for even the smallest clues, only to find what they feared in their own backyard. In Canada, two people die suddenly of unknown causes, and their deaths may not be as coincidental as they first appear.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Killing Time
programme.desc: A killer may strike in the middle of the night, and hide clues well. But the police are always there, ready and working, and they will never give up when they're on the trail of criminals who decide it's Killing Time.

programme.title: The New Detectives: True Crime
programme.desc: They know as much about crime as any crime fighter, or any criminal. They're the crime writers, and through their eyes we see murder most foul.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Death Grip
programme.desc: Fingerprinting: The Identification Division of the FBI relies on fingerprints as one of the most effective ways to identify criminals.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Vanished
programme.desc: In New York, an ambitious college student has her whole life ahead of her, until she crosses the path of a killer. It's a random murder, the hardest kind to solve.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Murder By Numbers
programme.desc: For serial killers, once is never enough. For investigators, the challenge is steep when the killers murder by numbers.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Stolen Identity
programme.desc: When a theft is committed, something valuable is stolen. But when a criminal needs a new identity, theft becomes a matter of life and death.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Predators And Parasites
programme.desc: For the forensic entomologist, the insects that nest in dead bodies are like tiny witnesses to a crime.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Fatal Impressions
programme.desc: 911 receives a desperate call in Fort Worth, Texas. A man's wife is shot. Forensic investigators search for clues in unlikely places, hoping the victim herself could provide information needed to determine how and why she died.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Drawing Conclusions
programme.desc: A teenager is abducted on a shopping trip. Two hikers disappear from the Appalachian Trail.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Solving crimes may begin with gut intuition, but advanced science provides investigators with irrefutable proof. When criminals go to great lengths to mask their crimes, Investigators must step up the challenge and remain forever undaunted.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Dead Men Do Talk
programme.desc: Profiles the work of world-renowned forensic experts and the procedures they use to solve murders and other mysteries in minutes or centuries after they happen.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Cold Cases
programme.desc: These cases took a decade or more to solve. There's no statute of limitations on murder. As a case turns cold, the clues become scarce, investigators must rely on science to close cold cases.

programme.desc: Katikati man Siegfried Newman disappeared on February 25, 2008, after he had dropped his sons Thomas, 9, and Oliver, 7, at Pahoia School. Police carried out a three-day search but found no sign of him.
